testcase.name: testAddMenuItem
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-07T10:52:49.660+05:30 INFO 24524 --- [hotbyte] [ main] c.h.h.s.i.MenuItemServiceImpl : createMenuItem called with dto: MenuItemRequestDTO(restaurantId=1, categoryId=1, itemName=Test Pizza, description=null, price=15.99, discountPrice=null, availabilityTime=null, dietaryInfo=null, tasteInfo=null, nutritionalInfo=null, isOutOfStock=false)
